Our Story

Baking Joy Since
1960

Popular Bakery has been the heart of Nellikatte, Puttur for over six decades. What started as a humble neighbourhood bakery has grown into a beloved institution — where every loaf, cake and sweet is made with the same passion and care as the very first day.

🌾

Finest Ingredients

Only the freshest, locally-sourced ingredients.

👨‍🍳

Master Bakers

Generations of skill in every creation.

❤️

Made with Love

Passion baked into every product.

🏅

Trusted Quality

78+ glowing reviews & counting.

Puttur's Favourite Bakery

"Best bakery in Puttur, hands down! Their black forest cake is to die for. We order every birthday from here — the quality has been consistent for years."
